description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Hyouton)

Rank: 10

Chakra Cost: 18

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 6

Perform: 14 | Perform DC: 30

Components: C, F, H

You raise many pillars of ice to encase the area, trapping all creatures within the area in an icy prison. When the prison is created, it deals 2d6 damage (half cold, half piercing. Reflex DC 15 halves) to all creatures adjacent to and outside of the prison. Creatures trapped within the prison take 1d6 cold damage every minute, which can be prevented by any item or effect that protects against cold weather.

The prison consists of 40 pillars of ice, which project your image to those inside the prison, and each pillar has the following statistics:

- 5 HP.
- Fire, electric and wind resistance 15.
- Immunity to cold and water damage.
- Immunity to rays and thrown weapons, which are reflected back to their origin (the creature will apply the attack roll/effects against itself).
- If destroyed by a melee attack, the attacker takes 1d4 cold damage.

Any cone or line attack used against the pillar(s) will also reflect back up to 10 ft with the same (Line) or maximum (Cone) possible width of the effect used. Such attacks still damage the pillar(s) normally. Once at least 15 adjacent pillars are destroyed, the prison crumbles. If you fall unconscious or die, the prison immediately collapses (no ill effects).
